title: Noetfield / SourceA Cloud Factory — Commercial Product Category Lock
commit_state: DRAFT — files written to working tree, NOT committed, NOT merged, NOT deployed. Pending founder ratification (assist_only lane).
lock_scope: Locks the IDENTITY of 10 commercial product categories (what each is, how it differs, its domain posture, and the receipt that gates its activation). This is a category-map lock, NOT a build/live/for-sale claim.

evidence_basis.note: Every cited proof-asset path confirmed to exist; every build_status adversarially re-checked with a downgrade-biased verifier against the ecosystem's documented fake-green failure mode.
evidence_basis.environment_limits: Read-only/offline: no GitHub Actions API, no live HTTP, no gh auth. CI-run-history and production-HTTP claims are receipt-attested, not re-observed.

categories_summary.product_name: Noetfield Workflow Builder / SourceA Agentic Workflows
Noetfield App Factory / SourceA App Builder
Noetfield Studio IDE / Forge Studio / Forge Terminal
TrustField / Noetfield AI Value Governance / SourceA / WitnessBC

governing_constraints_honored: Noetfield public GTM remains 3 locked SKUs (Trust Brief, Copilot Governance Pack, Bank Pilot); these 10 are platform/internal categories, not new public SKUs.
Noetfield 'never touches value' constitution preserved; TrustField framed as governance/decision layer, not money movement.
Product/canon boundary respected: product docs describe what is sold, do not compete with canon.
L0 repo-graph broad-read gate honored during evidence gathering.
note_on_gaps: Per-category evidence gaps DO exist and are recorded in each category's honesty_caveats in the registry. They gate ACTIVATION of that category (via its receipt_required_to_activate), NOT the lock of the category MAP. The map is therefore LOCKED, not BLOCKED.
activation_gate: No category advances its ladder rung or makes any external/commercial claim without producing its named receipt_required_to_activate. Rungs above P4 and all commercial activation are founder-gated.
next_action_for_founder: Review product/ deliverables; if ratified, commit on a governance branch (no merge/deploy). One founder push + 2 cloud runs would advance CAT-03/04/06 together (shared R2 blocker).

categories_changed: CAT-04 (loops built PR#10, RECONCILED_PASS, not VERIFIED)
CAT-06 (held partial-scaffold; not advanced by R2)

ratification_preconditions: DONE (PRODUCT_CATEGORY_LOCK_SYNC_v1): 4 CAT-03/04 proving receipts in canonical receipts/p0pgr/ (git-recovered, hash-verified); 2 cycle receipts unrecoverable (evidence embedded in R2 PASS).
